=== Endian Read Tests ===
LE16 [01,02] = 513
LE16 [05,00] = 5
LE16 [00,00] = 0
LE16 [7F,7F] = 32639
BE16 [01,02] = 258
BE16 [05,00] = 1280
BE16 [00,00] = 0
BE16 [7F,7F] = 32639
LE32 [01,00,00,00] = 1
LE32 [00,00,00,01] = 16777216
LE32 [01,02,03,04] = 67305985
LE32 [10,20,30,40] = 1076895760
BE32 [01,00,00,00] = 16777216
BE32 [00,00,00,01] = 1
BE32 [01,02,03,04] = 16909060
BE32 [10,20,30,40] = 270544960
